channel.title: Adobe Systems Incorporated — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Adobe Systems Incorporated (adobe).

item.title: CVE-2026-48389 · 7.8 HIGH — DNG SDK | Stack-based Buffer Overflow (CWE-121)
item.description: DNG SDK versions 1.7.1 2536 and earlier are affected by a Stack-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. Exploitation of this issue requires user interaction in that a victi…

item.title: CVE-2026-48373 · 7.8 HIGH — Acrobat Reader | Heap-based Buffer Overflow (CWE-122)
item.description: Acrobat Reader is affected by a Heap-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. Exploitation of this issue requires user interaction in that a victim must open a malicious fil…

item.title: CVE-2026-48295 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — CAI Content Credentials | Insufficiently Protected Credentials (CWE-522)
item.description: CAI Content Credentials is affected by an Insufficiently Protected Credentials vulnerability that could result in disclosure of sensitive information. An attacker could leverage this vulnerability to gain unauthorized read access. Exploitation of thi…

item.title: CVE-2026-48290 · 8.2 HIGH — CAI Content Credentials | Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) (CWE-918)
item.description: CAI Content Credentials is affected by a Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability to inject malicious scripts into…

item.title: CVE-2026-48357 · 6.2 MEDIUM — CAI Content Credentials | Uncontrolled Resource Consumption (CWE-400)
item.description: CAI Content Credentials is affected by an Uncontrolled Resource Consumption vulnerability that could lead to application denial-of-service. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability to exhaust system resources, resulting in an application denial-o…

item.title: CVE-2026-48296 · 6.2 MEDIUM — CAI Content Credentials | Integer Underflow (Wrap or Wraparound) (CWE-191)
item.description: CAI Content Credentials is affected by an Integer Underflow (Wrap or Wraparound) vulnerability that could result in an application denial-of-service. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability to crash the application, leading to a denial-of-servic…

item.title: CVE-2026-48287 · 7.4 HIGH — CAI Content Credentials | Untrusted Search Path (CWE-426)
item.description: CAI Content Credentials is affected by an Untrusted Search Path vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. Exploit depends on conditions beyond the attacker's control. Exploitation of this issue re…

item.title: CVE-2026-48312 · 6.8 MEDIUM — CAI Content Credentials | Improper Input Validation (CWE-20)
item.description: CAI Content Credentials is affected by an Improper Input Validation vulnerability that could result in a Security feature bypass. An attacker could leverage this vulnerability to bypass security measures and gain unauthorized write access. Exploitati…

item.title: CVE-2026-48351 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — CAI Content Credentials | Improper Input Validation (CWE-20)
item.description: CAI Content Credentials is affected by an Improper Input Validation vulnerability that could result in an application denial-of-service. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability to crash the application, leading to a denial-of-service condition.…

item.title: CVE-2026-48302 · 6.2 MEDIUM — CAI Content Credentials | Improper Input Validation (CWE-20)
item.description: CAI Content Credentials is affected by an Improper Input Validation vulnerability that could result in an application denial-of-service. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability to crash the application, leading to a denial-of-service condition.…

item.title: CVE-2026-48354 · 6.2 MEDIUM — CAI Content Credentials | Integer Overflow or Wraparound (CWE-190)
item.description: CAI Content Credentials is affected by an Integer Overflow or Wraparound vulnerability that could result in an application denial-of-service. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability to crash the application, leading to a denial-of-service condit…

item.title: CVE-2026-48298 · 6.2 MEDIUM — CAI Content Credentials | Integer Underflow (Wrap or Wraparound) (CWE-191)
item.description: CAI Content Credentials is affected by an Integer Underflow (Wrap or Wraparound) vulnerability that could result in an application denial-of-service. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability to crash the application, leading to a denial-of-servic…

item.title: CVE-2026-48352 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — CAI Content Credentials | Improper Input Validation (CWE-20)
item.description: CAI Content Credentials is affected by an Improper Input Validation vulnerability that could result in an application denial-of-service. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability to crash the application, leading to a denial-of-service condition.…

item.title: CVE-2026-48353 · 5.5 MEDIUM — CAI Content Credentials | Improper Input Validation (CWE-20)
item.description: CAI Content Credentials is affected by an Improper Input Validation vulnerability that could lead to arbitrary file system read. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability to access sensitive files and directories outside the intended access scope.…

item.title: CVE-2026-48336 · 7.8 HIGH — Illustrator | Out-of-bounds Write (CWE-787)
item.description: Illustrator is affected by an out-of-bounds write vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. Exploitation of this issue requires user interaction in that a victim must open a malicious file.

item.title: CVE-2026-48335 · 7.8 HIGH — Illustrator | Out-of-bounds Write (CWE-787)
item.description: Illustrator is affected by an out-of-bounds write vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. Exploitation of this issue requires user interaction in that a victim must open a malicious file.

item.title: CVE-2026-48337 · 7.8 HIGH — Illustrator | Out-of-bounds Write (CWE-787)
item.description: Illustrator is affected by an out-of-bounds write vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. Exploitation of this issue requires user interaction in that a victim must open a malicious file.

item.title: CVE-2026-48334 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Illustrator | Improper Input Validation (CWE-20)
item.description: Illustrator is affected by an Improper Input Validation vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. Exploitation of this issue requires user interaction in that a victim must open a malicious file.…

item.title: CVE-2026-48275 · 8.6 HIGH — Illustrator | Untrusted Search Path (CWE-426)
item.description: Illustrator is affected by an Untrusted Search Path vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. Exploitation of this issue requires user interaction in that a victim must open a malicious file. Scop…

item.title: CVE-2026-48320 · 8.5 HIGH — ColdFusion | Cross-site Scripting (Reflected XSS) (CWE-79)
item.description: ColdFusion is affected by a reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability to inject malicious scripts into a web page, potentially gaining elevated access or control over the victim's account or sess…

item.title: CVE-2026-48324 · 9.1 CRITICAL — ColdFusion | Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') (CWE-89)
item.description: ColdFusion is affected by an Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. Exploitation of this issue does not requ…

item.title: CVE-2026-48332 · 7.7 HIGH — ColdFusion | Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) (CWE-918)
item.description: ColdFusion is affected by a Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability that could result in a Security feature bypass. A low-privileged attacker could leverage this vulnerability to bypass security measures and gain unauthorized read access. Ex…

item.title: CVE-2026-48318 · 9.9 CRITICAL — ColdFusion | Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') (CWE-22)
item.description: ColdFusion is affected by an Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') vulnerability that could lead to arbitrary file system read. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability to access sensitive files and direct…

item.title: CVE-2026-48327 · 9 CRITICAL — ColdFusion | Incorrect Authorization (CWE-863)
item.description: ColdFusion is affected by an Incorrect Authorization vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. Exploitation of this issue does not require user interaction. Scope is changed.

item.title: CVE-2026-48338 · 6.8 MEDIUM — ColdFusion | Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') (CWE-22)
item.description: ColdFusion is affected by an Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') vulnerability that could lead to arbitrary file system read. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability to access sensitive files and direct…

item.title: CVE-2026-48329 · 2.7 LOW — ColdFusion | Insufficient Session Expiration (CWE-613)
item.description: ColdFusion is affected by an Insufficient Session Expiration vulnerability that could result in a Security feature bypass. A high-privileged attacker could leverage this vulnerability to bypass security measures and gain unauthorized write access. Ex…

item.title: CVE-2026-48319 · 9.1 CRITICAL — ColdFusion | Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') (CWE-22)
item.description: ColdFusion is affected by an Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. Exploitation of this issue does not require us…

item.title: CVE-2026-48321 · 9.3 CRITICAL — ColdFusion | Incorrect Authorization (CWE-863)
item.description: ColdFusion is affected by an Incorrect Authorization vulnerability that could result in privilege escalation. An attacker could leverage this vulnerability to gain unauthorized read and write access. Exploitation of this issue does not require user i…

item.title: CVE-2026-48322 · 9.6 CRITICAL — ColdFusion | Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection') (CWE-94)
item.description: ColdFusion is affected by an Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection') vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. Exploitation of this issue does not require user interaction. Scope…

item.title: CVE-2026-48284 · 9.6 CRITICAL — ColdFusion | Improper Input Validation (CWE-20)
item.description: ColdFusion is affected by an Improper Input Validation vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. Exploitation of this issue does not require user interaction. Scope is changed.

item.title: CVE-2026-48328 · 7.7 HIGH — ColdFusion | Improper Input Validation (CWE-20)
item.description: ColdFusion is affected by an Improper Input Validation vulnerability that could result in a Security feature bypass. A low-privileged attacker could leverage this vulnerability to bypass security measures and gain unauthorized read access. Exploitati…

item.title: CVE-2026-48325 · 9.3 CRITICAL — ColdFusion | Missing Authentication for Critical Function (CWE-306)
item.description: ColdFusion is affected by a Missing Authentication for Critical Function vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. Exploitation of this issue does not require user interaction. Scope is changed.

item.title: CVE-2026-48340 · 7.8 HIGH — Bridge | Untrusted Pointer Dereference (CWE-822)
item.description: Bridge is affected by an Untrusted Pointer Dereference vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. Exploitation of this issue requires user interaction in that a victim must open a malicious file.

item.description: Bridge is affected by an out-of-bounds write vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. Exploitation of this issue requires user interaction in that a victim must open a malicious file.

item.description: Bridge is affected by a Heap-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. Exploitation of this issue requires user interaction in that a victim must open a malicious file.

item.description: Bridge is affected by an out-of-bounds write vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. Exploitation of this issue requires user interaction in that a victim must open a malicious file.

item.description: Bridge is affected by an Integer Overflow or Wraparound vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. Exploitation of this issue requires user interaction in that a victim must open a malicious file.

item.description: Bridge is affected by an out-of-bounds write vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. Exploitation of this issue requires user interaction in that a victim must open a malicious file.

item.description: After Effects is affected by an out-of-bounds write vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. Exploitation of this issue requires user interaction in that a victim must open a malicious file.

item.description: After Effects is affected by an out-of-bounds write vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. Exploitation of this issue requires user interaction in that a victim must open a malicious file.

item.description: Premiere Pro is affected by a Heap-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user. Exploitation of this issue requires user interaction in that a victim must open a malicious file.

item.description: Media Encoder is affected by an out-of-bounds read vulnerability that could lead to disclosure of sensitive memory. An attacker could leverage this vulnerability to disclose sensitive information. Exploitation of this issue requires user interaction…
